subject: [RFC PATCH v2 3/7] mm, swap: support physical swap as a vswap backend

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch adds support for physical swap as a backend for the virtual swap layer (vswap). It allows vswap to allocate a physical slot on demand when needed, serving as a fallback for zswap_store failures or as the destination for zswap writeback. The physical slot is tracked via a Pointer-tagged swap_table entry on the physical cluster, referencing the vswap entry. This patch modifies several kernel files, including mm/memory.c, mm/page_io.c, and mm/swapfile.c, to implement this functionality.
